commit.subject: LU-19325 tests: fix recovery-small test_17b
commit.message:
LU-19325 tests: fix recovery-small test_17b

recovery-small test_17b uses the ptlrpc kernel module's
ldlm_enqueue_min parameter. It must not be mixed with the
ldlm_enqueue_min ldlm tunable.

Fixes: 0a5ee1a2a2 ("LU-18878 ptlrpc: evictor/prolong timeout formula fix")
Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I63310cddf71193e7ad33154b43d8fc8fa64a2c17
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61145
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
